feed.title: Minchin.ca - Comments: Civil Engineering Is Stuff That Isn’t Supposed To Move

entry.title: Posted by: Smokeythefurball
entry.summary: Quit making excuses for Civil Engineers. Bully for you that you trust them, but there have been too many reports of problems with bridges & buck passing in the past ten years or so to say these are random incidents. If bridges were designed properly they would not collapse. Maybe its …
entry.content: Quit making excuses for Civil Engineers. Bully for you that you trust them, but there have been too many reports of problems with bridges & buck passing in the past ten years or so to say these are random incidents. If bridges were designed properly they would not collapse. Maybe its about time the engineers who design these things were held accountable & tried in a court of law.
